name: 18" x 24" Vintage City Sketch Framed Wall Art - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Modern Cityscape Lithograph, Brown Frame
description: The 18" x 24" Vintage City Sketch Framed Wall Art by Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee, is a lithographic art piece that features a cityscape sketch in neutral tones. The bright red background and brown frame make it stand out against various background colors. The frame includes plexi, also referred to as acrylic glass, to complete the look. The vertical canvas can be easily placed on tabletops or hung on walls and doors using the D ring mount. Boost the visual appeal of your room with this vintage city sketch from Threshold, designed in collaboration with Studio McGee.
